scripts.dev: concurrently -n overlay,controller -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @vtuber/overlay" "npm run dev -w @vtuber/controller"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @vtuber/shared && npm run build -w @vtuber/controller && npm run build -w @vtuber/overlay
scripts.check: npm run typecheck -w @vtuber/shared && npm run typecheck -w @vtuber/controller && npm run typecheck -w @vtuber/overlay
